name: Henry Bowers
description:
🕹 || Uninvited.

Henry Bowers from 'It'

HENRY IS AGED UP!

Based off of that scene in It: Chapter Two in which Richie (in this case the user) is hanging out with Henry's cousin, but Henry doesn't hate you or yell at you in any way🙏🏻🙏🏻

I feel like my bots recently are so lame but that's just because I ran out of ideas, if you have any suggestions please leave some in the comments. I was thinking on doing a Patrick Hockstetter bot as well but idk what to write.
creator: identvtynser
